message:
fix: invalidate robot triage disk cache when .beads/ directory changes (#127)

The disk cache for robot triage stored GraphStats keyed by data hash,
but did not check whether the underlying .beads/ directory had been
modified since the cache entry was created. This meant stale graph
metrics could persist after beads were closed in br.

- Add mtime-based staleness check: compare .beads/ directory and file
  modification times against cache entry creation time
- Add --no-cache flag and BV_NO_CACHE=1 env var to bypass disk cache
- Respect BV_NO_CACHE in robotDiskCacheEnabled()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
